calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:17am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Samuel Edia appears in pro per with Friday Edia. Respondents Bruce Murphy and Yury Murphy appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Newman.

EXHR (A) 1 page demand letter
EXHR (B) Copy of subpoena
EXHR (C) Returned mail and Debtors Statement to compare writing
EXHA (1) Affidavit & spreadsheet - not admitted into evidence, returned to appellant

Respondents call Henry Davis Jr. to testify.
Respondents call Michelle Santiago to testify.

10:02
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-18-2010 Judgment Entered
